request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. The recent 'burden-sharing' debate misses the point: our allies aren't just freeloaders, they're partners in deterrence. Cutting commitments would leave us isolated, exactly what adversaries want. Remember, our strength comes from unity, not going it alone. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
